title: LividJava's Create Tempered
description: The version of LividJava's Create using the Neoforge mod loader!
body:
![super cool stylized title card, poorly hand written text says "LividJava's" in embossed text with brass casing "Create" and in cool flaming text animated "Tempered"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6d9b690fa0863b02d43528e281205e1da815de5.gif)

Before there was LJC the Forge Edition, which was originally distributed on Curseforge, then there was LJCQ the Re-Stitched (Quilt) Edition. Now there's LividJava's Create Tempered the Neoforge Edition.

After waiting for Create Fabric to update, for too long. The decision was made to switch to Neoforge. If you've played the Other versions, you'll know a few of the key features already.

## Main Features
**Create** - Rather than mysterious box do thing, you can actually see every step of the processing process. Travel around your world using Chain conveyors, Belts, Trains and more. This is the Feature mod of the pack!

**Create: Aeronautics** - Kiss the skies, sail the seas and mobilize your entire base! Aeronautics is the **Keystone Mod** that I originally developed and centered this modpack around! Land, Sea, and Air. All of it is now possible with Aeronautics.

**Terralith, BOP, YUNG's Better X, Create: Let the Adventure Begin** - Plenty of mods that add Structures, Biomes, and other things to discover and explore around each corner of the world.

**QoL** - Some minor QoL improvements added with various Raccoon Magics imbued into the pack! You'll find recipes that let you mix Lava and Water into Obsidian, Curious recipes that allow you to add molten Gold plus a drop of Liquid XP giving you Enchanted Golden Apples!

**No-QoL** - With great QoLs come Compromises! As such, Nether Ice Boats and Elytra have been removed from the game! The reason? Exploration, getting around, finding new stuff! Get creative with your transport, find new ways! If you've played Restitched or the original version, this won't be a new concept!

# Why?
Elytra remove the exploration format and simplify much of the Transportation aspects, which doesn't mesh well with a mod like Create. As a result, they have been removed from this particular line of modpacks.

Nether Ice Boats have also been nerfed. You cannot place Ice or Boats in the Nether, encouraging the use of other transportation means. Be that Overworld or using a High-Speed Create Nether Transit.

# Who?
This pack is for myself, but also for those who enjoy exploration and solving transit problems. If you've played the previous versions, this is the same flavor with a couple of extras.
